_comment: Per-source link overrides for indicator table cells. When this file has an entry for a (metric_label, country) combo, the JS renders each source as a separate clickable item within the cell instead of the single text+link from tracker.json.

US.text: 23.8% Edmunds research share (+3.1pp from 20.7% Feb 24, week of Mar 9-15)
CarGurus new EV listing views +31%, used +40% (Q1 vs Q4 2025)

Germany.text: mobile.de: +24pp in EV search share (12% Feb 28 → 36% as of Mar 26)
Carwow: +8pp in EV configurator builds (55% Feb 28 → 63% as of Mar 12)
MeinAuto: +40% EV web traffic since Feb 28 (as of Mar 12)

UK.text: AutoTrader: new EV leads +28%, used +15% (Motor Trader)
Octopus EV leasing enquiries +36% (Mar 1-22 vs Feb 8-28)

Australia.text: carsales EV searches ~3x MoM; +76.7% WoW peak (week of Mar 9)

South Korea.text: Herald Economy: EV search volume +28% first week of March

US.text: Cox: Q1 2026 used EV sales +12% YoY; avg transaction price $34,600 (within $1,300 of comparable ICE)

UK.text: AutoTrader: Used EVs at 19.5% of all 0-5yr used car leads (all-time record)
Octopus EV: used EV sales ~4x in 6 months (Oct 2025 to Apr 2026)
Marketcheck: daily used EV sales 1,100+/day post-war vs 561-965 pre-war range

Germany.text: mobile.de used EV dealer enquiries +66% vs February

France.text: Aramis Auto: used EV sales share 6.5% → 12.7% (week of Feb 16 → week of Mar 9, ~doubled)

UK.text: Polestar UK: test drive bookings tripled since Feb 28
Kia UK: test drive requests +84% YoY

Australia.text: BEV inventory shortages; dealers reporting AU$8-10K premiums above MSRP

Vietnam.text: VinFast showroom traffic 4x; 250 EVs sold in 3 weeks post-war
